channel.title: bloggy blog on alexis lavail
channel.description: Recent content in bloggy blog on alexis lavail

item.title: It's a start
item.description: Welcome to this blog! Hello world I guess. Why this blog? Well, thanks for asking. You provide some sort of peer-pressure so that I regularly write something. I suck at writing, and I dislike it. So this will be a good kick in the butt. Expect some science, much nonsense, some landscapes, beer-brewing and other misc. How often should I write? How often will I write? Who knows … But at least a post a week should be good, non?
